risk_rationale: The Electronic Trade Documents Act 2023 primarily impacts the legal recognition of electronic trade documents, which aligns with existing e-commerce practices. It does not directly conflict with TikTok's current e-commerce compliance baseline, but it requires monitoring to ensure alignment with enhanced security and efficiency measures.

compliance_gaps.regulatory_requirement: Legal recognition of electronic trade documents
compliance_gaps.gap_description: The new regulation recognizes electronic trade documents, which may require updates to ensure transparency in electronic document handling and currency conversion processes.

remediations.title: Update E-commerce Documentation Processes
remediations.description: Ensure that all electronic trade documents are legally recognized and handled with transparency in line with the new UK regulation. This includes updating processes to enhance security and efficiency in handling such documents.
acceptance_criteria: All electronic trade documents are legally recognized and processed efficiently
Currency conversion processes are transparent and compliant with the new regulation

business_impact: Minimal business impact expected as the regulation aligns with existing practices, but requires updates to documentation processes to ensure compliance.
recommended_actions: Implement updates to enhance security and efficiency
Monitor for any further regulatory changes related to electronic trade documents
